MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Off calendar by request of the moving party. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John G. Downing, Esq. 510/986-8661 for defendamts KA,ES GPETZ and LESLIE THORNDIKE moving for summary adjudication to the 2nd Cause of Action to enforce mechanic's lien
Plaintiff JERRY LIBERATORE in propria persona and opposing party

Mr. Liberatore's request for a continuance of this matter was denied by the Court. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with respect to Defendants' motion for summary adjudication -- Granted -- no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. The Court also signed an order granting the motion to compel arbitration which was on calendar for January 3, 2002.
(JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Granted -- no opposition filed. (DAG) Valerie Papale, CSR 6899
